title: Looking for Teacher at IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates:
IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates!
